items.name: Eggs on Toast
items.description: Eggs to your liking on toasted turkish bread.

items.name: Avocado on toast
items.description: Roast tomato aioli, locally grown avocado, beetroot relish, whipped fetta, lemon wedge & house made dukkah on toasted sourdough.

items.name: Breakfast Croissant
items.description: Butter croissant topped with smashed avocado, fresh spinach, bacon, free range poached egg, hash brown and house made hollandaise.

items.name: Bacon & Eggs
items.description: Bacon, slow roasted tomato, hash brown, toasted turkish bread and eggs to your liking.

items.name: Pancakes
items.description: Buttermilk pancakes with salted caramel sauce, toasted coconut, brulee banana, macadamia and coconut crumb, strawberries and vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Corn Fritters
items.description: Corn fritters served with bacon, poached egg, cherry tomato, avocado, feta and coriander salsa and tomato relish.

items.name: Eggs Valetta
items.description: Slow roasted tomato, mushrooms, avocado, toasted turkish bread and poached eggs. *Substituted with mushrooms during asparagus shortage.

items.name: Porridge
items.description: Creamy coconut, cinnamon, barley & oats porridge topped with caramelised miso pear & apple compote, toasted walnuts, strawberries & vanilla bean mascarpone.

items.name: Eggs Benedict with Ham
items.description: Served on toasted turkish bread with fresh shoulder ham and house made hollandaise.

items.name: Eggs Benedict with Bacon
items.description: Served on toasted turkish bread with bacon and house made hollandaise.

items.name: Eggs Benedict with Smoked Salmon
items.description: Served on toasted turkish bread with smoked salmon and house made hollandaise.

items.name: Baked Eggs
items.description: House made chorizo and baked beans hot pot topped with fried eggs, chilli oil, feta and toasted turkish bread.

items.name: Omelette
items.description: Three egg omelette with spinach, ham, mushroom and feta served with toasted turkish bread.

items.name: Chilli Scrambled
items.description: Free range scrambled eggs topped with house made chilli oil, grilled chorizo, feta and chilli threads on toasted sourdough.

items.name: Panna Cotta
items.description: Chai panna cotta topped with pistachio nougat crumb served with house made oat, nut & puffed wheat granola, chai spiced coulis, caramelised apple, vanilla bean mascarpone, strawberries and almond tuile.

items.name: French Toast
items.description: House made brioche french toast with maple syrup, berries, ice cream and bacon.

items.name: Fruit & Nut Loaf
items.description: One slice of toasted fruit and nut loaf with vanilla poached pears and whipped lemon curd.

items.name: Ham & Cheese Toastie
items.description: Shaved ham, cheese & tomato on toasted turkish bread.

items.name: Toasted Croissant
